calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-24-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-09-29 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: ROGER E. JACKSON, esq. specially appeared for plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Mar-24-2026 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: D. Diaz; Not reported. (610)

After the hearing, a Notice of Settlement of Entire Action was filed. Case will now be moved to the Order to Show Cause re: CRC 3.1385 calendar for Jan-09-2029 at 10:30am in Department 610.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2025 Continued To Dec-23-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
